zh.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anabella FitzHugh於1308年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Henry FitzHugh42歲，母親Eve de Bulmer34歲。她於1327年與Sir Henry Vavasour II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1353年12月9日之前在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特。

zh-hans.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anabella FitzHugh于1308年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Henry FitzHugh42岁，母亲Eve de Bulmer34岁。她于1327年与Sir Henry Vavasour II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1353年12月9日之前在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Anabella
meanings: A female name formed from Hannibal.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Anabella FitzHugh was born in 1308, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry FitzHugh, was 42 and her mother, Eve de Bulmer, was 34. She married Sir Henry Vavasour II in 1327. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 9 December 1353, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anabella FitzHugh est née en 1308, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry FitzHugh, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Eve de Bulmer, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Vavasour II en 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 9 décembre 1353, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anabella FitzHugh 1308 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry FitzHugh 42 und ihre Mutter Eve de Bulmer 34. Sie hat 1327 Sir Henry Vavasour II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 9. Dezember 1353 in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anabella FitzHugh è nata il nel 1308 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry FitzHugh, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Eve de Bulmer, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Vavasour II nel 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 9 dicembre 1353, nel Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: イギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスター
ja.Brinbridge, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Anabella FitzHughが1308年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry FitzHughは42歳，母Eve de Bulmerは34歳であった。1327年にSir Henry Vavasour IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1353年12月9日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anabella FitzHugh(이)가 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry FitzHugh(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve de Bulmer(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1327년 Sir Henry Vavasour II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1353년 12월 9일 이전 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 사망했다.

pt.from 25 May 1334 to 1 August 1355: de 25 de maio de 1334 a 1 de agosto de 1355
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anabella FitzHugh nasceu em 1308, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry FitzHugh, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Bulmer, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Vavasour II em 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 9 de dezembro de 1353, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anabella FitzHugh родилась в 1308 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry FitzHugh было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Eve de Bulmer, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Vavasour II в 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 9 декабрь 1353 г. в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия.
